description:
The ``Multiplex`` node is a node that changes its output to a specific input based on its index.

The node can be used as a fixed-size* array in ProtoFlux or to iterate over multiple values or variables in a For Loop. The size of a multiplex can be near infinite, and can multiplex any Type.

fields.Index: Selects the input value for the output.
fields.Inputs: A fixed-size* array of items with a type that will always match Output's type.
fields.Output: Returns the selected value from the selected index.
fields.InputCount: The number of inputs in the fixed-size* array of items in Inputs.

notes.title: Footnotes
notes.text: * It can be made bigger or smaller while editing the flux.
